name: Trade Flow Absorption by Ask Wall (Contra)
hypothesis: A strong burst of buyer-initiated trades (`zscore > 2.0`) directly into a dense ask wall (`ask_depth_concentration > 0.4`) represents an attempted breakout that is likely to be absorbed and fail, leading to a price reversal downwards. This is a contra-momentum signal.
mutation_note: Novel signal combining two Block C primitives. Inspired by observing strong but inconsistent performance from both trade flow and book shape signals individually; this tests if their interaction creates a more robust reversal signal.
